'''nadhadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyberactivism|cyberactivism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyberactivism|cyberactivism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nadhadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædhædhæth|nædhædhæth]] || [[word:nædhædhæj|nædhædhæj]] || [[word:nædhædhæsh|nædhædhæsh]] || [[word:nædhædhæ|nædhædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadhadhadhath|nadhadhadhath]] || [[word:nadhadhadhaj|nadhadhadhaj]] || [[word:nadhadhadhash|nadhadhadhash]] || [[word:nadhadhadha|nadhadhadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadhadhath|nadhadhath]] || [[word:nadhadhaj|nadhadhaj]] || [[word:nadhadhash|nadhadhash]] || [[word:nadhadha|nadhadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadhafdhafth|nadhafdhafth]] || [[word:nadhafdhafj|nadhafdhafj]] || [[word:nadhafdhafsh|nadhafdhafsh]] || [[word:nadhafdhaf|nadhafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadhadhatha|nadhadhatha]] || [[word:nadhadhaja|nadhadhaja]] || [[word:nadhadhasha|nadhadhasha]] || [[word:nadhadhaka|nadhadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadhadhath|nadhadhath]] || [[word:nadhadhaj|nadhadhaj]] || [[word:nadhadhash|nadhadhash]] || [[word:nadhadha|nadhadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadhadhathal|nadhadhathal]] || [[word:nadhadhajal|nadhadhajal]] || [[word:nadhadhashal|nadhadhashal]] || [[word:nadhadhakal|nadhadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadhadhaathatha|nadhadhaathatha]] || [[word:nadhadhaajaja|nadhadhaajaja]] || [[word:nadhadhaashasha|nadhadhaashasha]] || [[word:nadhadhaaka|nadhadhaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadhadhathan|nadhadhathan]] || [[word:nadhadhajan|nadhadhajan]] || [[word:nadhadhashan|nadhadhashan]] || [[word:nadhadhakan|nadhadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadhadhathaoro|nadhadhathaoro]] || [[word:nadhadhajaoro|nadhadhajaoro]] || [[word:nadhadhashaoro|nadhadhashaoro]] || [[word:nadhadhakaoro|nadhadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
